title: Breakfast in Berlin - Quick Summary
items: **For most sightseeing mornings, choose a bakery breakfast or simple cafe stop.** Save slow brunch for a day without a hard start.
**Bakery sprint:** bread roll, pastry, coffee and water is usually the fastest, cheapest way to protect the morning.
**Brunch is a time block, not a backup plan.** If you need to be somewhere before noon, do not start a popular weekend brunch by accident.
**Sunday changes the map.** Regular supermarkets are usually closed, so use a bakery, cafe, hotel breakfast, station shop or planned brunch.
**Before the 11:30 BerlinWalk tour:** eat simply, hydrate, handle bathroom/ticket logistics, then reach the World Clock without rushing.
